metadata.name: ModJam Vol. 3 (75+ New Cards!)
metadata.description:
[h2] [b]REPENTOGON+ IS REQUIRED![/b] [/h2] [i] You know the drill, download Repentogon+ [url=https://repentogon.com/] here! [/url] [/i]
[h2] [b]75+ New Cards![/b] [/h2] [img] https://file.garden/aYULvni48hrZ2pCM/Template.gif [/img] [b]ModJam Volume 3 is all about cards![/b] This mod introduces a new card set containing over [b] 75 [/b] new cards for you to find in your runs! Some are pretty simple, while others are, well, [i] very interesting [/i] to say the least. Each team was allowed to create up to 8 cards and 1 miscellaneous thing, such as an item, trinket, or something else! We hope you enjoy using these new cards!
For those looking to try to find the cards without relying on random room clear rewards, there's a new item called [b] Binder [/b] that spawns a card from the mod upon use! It can be found in the Treasure and Library pools, but can also be spawned via the console.
[h3] Credits [/h3] [list] [*] [b]ConBoi[/b] - Jam Organizer [*] [b]Kerkel[/b] - Mod Compiler (ty goat) [*] [b]Split[/b] - Thumbnail Artist (also ty goat) [/list]
[h3] Cards created by the following teams: [/h3] [list] [*] [b]Skulldier, Monwil[/b] [*] [b]Kerkel, Biddybododode[/b] [*] [b]Reixen, DPower[/b] [*] [b]Doodledude, Brenden_Person[/b] [*] [b]Aeronaut, Truji[/b] [*] [b]Spoop, Split[/b] [*] [b]Foks, Wons[/b] [*] [b]Babybluesheep[/b] [*] [b]Stale[/b] [*] [b]4Head, Andre Doruk[/b] [*] [b]Rat[/b] [*] [b]John Sorrow[/b] [*] [b]Jane Sorrow[/b] [*] [b]Gloopy20[/b] [/list]
[i] Check out ModJam Vol. 1 [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3555278833] here [/url] and ModJam Vol. 2 [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3662150881] here [/url] if you haven't seen them! [/i]
